title: ConvertKit vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ConvertKit vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ConvertKit and Loops comes down to your specific use case. ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on creators, bloggers, and course sellers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ConvertKit wins for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Loops?
faq.a: ConvertKit starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
